category_sources: source_facts.description says it runs a query in psql and outputs CSV; official README says the same and documents query and CSV options.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is psql2csv; official GitHub README title is psql2csv.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, usage, options, examples, and advanced usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/fphilipe/psql2csv; per instruction, repo not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe PostgreSQL query-to-CSV functionality.
